title: Strategy
text: For two rails, the encoded word is made by reading the top rail followed by the bottom rail. Try to imagine how many letters the zig-zag would have placed on each rail.

title: Example
text: Split the encoded word into two parts: one for the top rail and one for the bottom rail. Then rebuild the zig-zag by alternating letters between the rails — first from the top, then from the bottom, repeating until the word is complete.
